criteria.name: approved spec inputs bound
criteria.rule: P2-SPEC-01 and P2-SPEC-02 must have approved review decisions whose subject_hash matches current generated outputs.

criteria.name: self review approved
criteria.rule: P2-SPEC-03 must have a human review decision approving the current review target subject hash before lock creation.

criteria.name: implementation remains blocked
criteria.rule: Every P2 implementation workpack remains WAITING_P2_SPEC_LOCK before lock creation.

criteria.name: test obligations closed structurally
criteria.rule: Every P2 validation row maps to an implementation workpack, required artifacts, and minimum test targets.

criteria.name: scope constrained to candidate
criteria.rule: This workpack may write only P2-SPEC-03 candidate files and must not change locks, source code, or P2 phase control files.

criteria.name: explicit lock command required
criteria.rule: A later step must explicitly request P2_SPEC_LOCK creation; this candidate only prepares reviewed inputs.

criteria.name: implementation write paths executable
criteria.rule: Every implementation code_target, test_target, and required artifact contract path must be covered by allowed_write_paths_after_lock.

criteria.name: implementation dependencies machine readable
criteria.rule: Each implementation workpack must declare direct_depends_on_workpacks and requires_completed_workpacks, not only prose order.

criteria.name: pending candidate hashes resolved by lock tooling
criteria.rule: P2-SPEC-03 pending null file hashes are acceptable only in this candidate bundle; final P2_SPEC_LOCK must recompute concrete hashes and reject pending rows.

lock_creation_blockers: The user has not explicitly requested P2_SPEC_LOCK creation in this step.
Final lock tooling must recompute concrete P2-SPEC-03 file hashes from disk and reject pending rows.
